bs-usermanager-desc: Used in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=ExtensionInfo}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=ExtensionInfo], description of user manager extension

bs-usermanager-no-self-block: Error message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when trying to block yourself
bs-usermanager-block-error:
Error message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when the user could not be disabled.

* $1 is the username of the user affected by the action - use for GENDER distinction
bs-usermanager-unblock-error:
Error message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when the user could not be enabled.

* $1 is the username of the user affected by the action - use for GENDER distinction
bs-usermanager-headerenabled:
Column headline and label for enabled status
{{Identical|Enabled}}
bs-usermanager-log-user-disabled:
Log text when user was disabled via UserManager.

* $1 is the username - use for GENDER distinction
bs-usermanager-user-disabled:
Success message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when the user was disabled.

* $1 is the username of the user affected by the action - use for GENDER distinction
bs-usermanager-user-enabled:
Success message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when the user was enabled.

* $1 is the username of the user affected by the action - use for GENDER distinction
bs-usermanager-confirmdisableuser: Text in the confirmation dialog for disabling a user.
bs-usermanager-confirmenableuser: Text in the confirmation dialog for enabling a user.
usermanager: Page title for special page of user manager
bs-usermanager-group-add-not-allowed:
Error message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when trying to add a user to a restricted group

* $1 is the name of the restricted group
bs-usermanager-group-remove-not-allowed:
Error message in [{{canonicalurl:Special:WikiAdmin|mode=UserManager}} Special:WikiAdmin?mode=UserManager] when trying to remove a user from a restricted group

* $1 is the name of the restricted group

bs-usermanager-multipleuserselected: Used as explain text of an alert panel with JavaScript

Label for the "password" option on password change strategy

bs-usermanager-icon-bool-false-aria-labe: Aria label for a icon that indicates a unchecked state of a boolean option

bs-usermanager-disabled: Text for the pill displaying that a user is disabled

Generic error message for missing parameters.

bs-usermanager-mass-enable: Label for the mass enable button
bs-usermanager-mass-disable: Label for the mass disable button
bs-usermanager-error-generic: Generic error message for an unknown error
bs-usermanager-password-repeat-mismatch-: Label for validity check if passwords do not match

Shows how many members a group has.
Parameters:
* - $1 is the number of members

Text shown above the list of groups a user belongs to.
Parameters:
* - $1 is the user name.
* - $2 is the number of groups

bs-usermanager-create-groups-dialog-titl: Title of the dialog used to create a new group

bs-usermanager-groups-header-group-name: Column header in the groups table showing the group name
bs-usermanager-groups-header-members: Column header in the groups table showing the number of members

bs-usermanager-action-delete-group: Label for an action that deletes a group

bs-usermanager-group-details-header-acti: Column header for the action used to remove a user from the group
bs-usermanager-group-details-section-mem: Section title in the group details view listing the members of the group
Label for the action that adds a new user to the group

Confirmation message shown before deleting a group.

* - $1 is the group name

bs-usermanager-group-details-error-delet: Error message shown if deleting a group fails

Error message shown when a requested group cannot be found.
Parameters:
* $1 is the group name

Confirmation message shown before removing a user from a group.

bs-usermanager-group-not-existing: Error label that group does not exist
bs-usermanager-group-already-exists: Error label that a group with this name already exists
bs-usermanager-group-invalid-name-length: Error label for group name which exceeds max number of characters
bs-usermanager-group-invalid-name-numeri: Error label if group name does not contain any character
bs-usermanager-group-invalid-name: Error label if group name contains invalid characters
